projectDescription: A privacy-first desktop API client built with Tauri v2 — no login, no cloud, ~60 MB RAM — supporting REST, GraphQL, gRPC, WebSocket, SSE, and MQTT in one lightweight app.
keyFeatures: Multi-protocol support: REST, GraphQL, gRPC, WebSocket, SSE, MQTT, Socket.IO
Local-first YAML storage — git-diffable, no proprietary formats
TypeScript scripting with pre/post-request scripts and ark.test() API
Collection Runner with data-driven testing (CSV/JSON) and JUnit/HTML reports
Local Mock Servers with Faker.js data, latency simulation, and error injection
Scheduled Monitoring with cron expressions, desktop notifications, and webhooks
Proxy Capture for local HTTP/HTTPS traffic inspection and replay
Plugin System supporting JavaScript and WASM extensions
AI Assistant for natural language to request generation and auto-test creation
Import from Postman, Insomnia, Bruno, Hoppscotch, OpenAPI, HAR, and cURL
~60 MB RAM usage and <2s cold startup, built on Tauri v2 (not Electron)
Response Diff for side-by-side comparison across runs
publicApiSurface: ark.env.set(key, value) — set environment variable in scripts
ark.env.get(key) — get environment variable in scripts
ark.response.json() — parse response body as JSON
AuthConfig — discriminated union: none | bearer | basic | api-key | oauth2 | digest | aws-v4 | ntlm | jwt-bearer | saml
ResponseData — response shape with status, headers, cookies, body, timeMs, sizeBytes
CollectionNode — tree node type: collection | folder | request
MockServerConfig / MockServerStatus — local mock server types
